zh.summary: 意大利和德国俱乐部正在关注流浪者队中场球员巴伦作为潜在的转会目标。与此同时，凯尔特人队正在考虑签下曼联门神，显示苏格兰足球界的积极引援活动。

title: Senegal sack manager Thiaw in wake of World Cup exit
summary: Senegal dismissed manager Pape Thiaw following the nation's elimination from the 2026 World Cup at the last-32 stage. The managerial change comes as the federation assesses the team's disappointing tournament exit.
content: Senegal sack manager Pape Thiaw in the aftermath of the country's exit at the last-32 stage of the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 塞内加尔在世界杯出局后解雇主帅蒂亚夫
zh.summary: 在塞内加尔在2026年世界杯32强淘汰赛阶段遭淘汰后，塞内加尔足联解雇了主帅帕佩·蒂亚夫。足协在评估球队令人失望的世界杯之旅后做出了这一人事变动。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 35
summary: This interactive feature challenges readers to identify World Cup star number 35 based on limited clues. The guessing game tests football knowledge across the tournament's standout performers.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜一猜世界杯明星第35号
zh.summary: 这个互动功能挑战读者根据有限的线索识别世界杯明星第35号。这个猜谜游戏考验足球爱好者对锦标赛杰出表现者的了解。

title: Footballers more likely to suffer depression and anxiety - study
summary: A new study reveals that former elite footballers exhibit reduced brain volume and elevated rates of depression and anxiety, alongside reported cognitive and decision-making difficulties. The findings underscore potential long-term health risks associated with elite football careers.
content: A new study finds evidence of reduced brain volume in former elite footballers, who also report difficulties with thinking skills and decision-making.

zh.title: 足球运动员更容易患抑郁症和焦虑症——研究
zh.summary: 一项新研究表明，前精英足球运动员脑容量减少，抑郁症和焦虑症患病率升高，同时还存在认知和决策困难。这些发现强调了精英足球生涯可能带来的长期健康风险。

title: 'We should all be excited' - Messi set for first England meeting
summary: Lionel Messi is set to face England for the first time after Argentina defeated Switzerland in the World Cup quarter-finals. The historic matchup represents a significant milestone in the football legend's career.
content: Lionel Messi is set for his first match against England after Argentina beat Switzerland in the World Cup quarter-finals.

zh.title: "我们都应该感到兴奋" - 梅西将首次对阵英格兰
zh.summary: 阿根廷在世界杯四分之一决赛中击败瑞士后，莱昂内尔·梅西将首次对阵英格兰。这场历史性的比赛代表了足球传奇人物职业生涯中的一个重要里程碑。

title: Argentina set up England semi-final with extra-time victory over Switzerland
summary: Argentina advances to the World Cup semi-final against England after a 3-1 extra-time victory over 10-man Switzerland in Kansas City.
content: Argentina set up a World Cup semi-final with England after scoring twice in extra-time to beat 10-man Switzerland 3-1 in Kansas City.

zh.title: 阿根廷凭借加时赛胜利晋级与英格兰的半决赛
zh.summary: 阿根廷在堪萨斯城以3-1的加时赛成绩战胜10人瑞士队，晋级世界杯半决赛，对阵英格兰。

title: Bellingham reaching heights of World Cup legends with Messi next
summary: Jude Bellingham continues to produce exceptional performances at the 2026 World Cup, matching records previously set by all-time greats as England progresses toward a semi-final clash with Argentina. His form has made him one of the tournament's most influential players.
content: Jude Bellingham again dazzles England and the World Cup with his brilliance, matching some records of the all-time greats.

zh.title: 贝林厄姆达到世界杯传奇高度，接下来对阵梅西
zh.summary: 朱德·贝林厄姆在2026年世界杯上继续表现出色，与历史伟大球员创造的纪录相匹配，英格兰正在向与阿根廷的半决赛冲刺。他的表现使他成为本届世界杯最具影响力的球员之一。

title: Top four ranked teams make semi-finals for first time
summary: For the first time in FIFA rankings history, the top four ranked teams have simultaneously advanced to the World Cup semi-finals. The achievement demonstrates the sustained dominance of elite football nations at the tournament's highest level.
content: For the first time since there have been Fifa rankings the top four ranked teams have made the semi-final of the World Cup.

zh.title: 排名前四的球队首次进入半决赛
zh.summary: FIFA排名历史上首次出现排名前四的球队同时晋级世界杯半决赛。这一成就展示了精英足球国家在该赛事最高水平上的持久统治力。

title: Embolo sent off as result of mistaken identity rule
summary: Switzerland's Breel Embolo became the first player in World Cup history to be sent off under a newly introduced mistaken identity rule. The incident highlights early implementation complexities with the recent law change.
content: Switzerland's Breel Embolo becomes first player to be sent off as a result of a new law for mistaken identity at the World Cup.

zh.title: 恩博洛因错误身份识别规则被罚下
zh.summary: 瑞士球员布里尔·恩博洛成为世界杯历史上首名因新引入的错误身份识别规则而被罚下的球员。这一事件凸显了新法规实施初期的复杂性。

title: Alvarez's stunning strike gives Argentina lead against 10-man Switzerland
summary: Julian Alvarez scores a stunning goal during extra-time to give Argentina the lead in their World Cup quarter-final against 10-man Switzerland in Kansas City.
content: Argentina retake the lead in their quarter-final against Switzerland through a stunning strike from Julian Alvarez during extra-time in Kansas City.

zh.title: 阿尔瓦雷斯的精彩进球助阿根廷领先10人瑞士队
zh.summary: 朱利安·阿尔瓦雷斯在加时赛中打进精彩进球，为阿根廷在堪萨斯城世界杯四分之一决赛对阵10人瑞士队的比赛中取得领先。

title: Tuchel angry at 'lucky' England - but Bellingham defends players
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel drew reaction by describing his team as "lucky" following their World Cup quarter-final victory over Norway, earning support from former players but disagreement from goal-scorer Jude Bellingham. The comments sparked debate about the team's performance quality.
content: England head coach Thomas Tuchel is praised by former England players for saying his players "got lucky" in World Cup quarter-final win over Norway - but match-winner Jude Bellingham disagrees.

zh.title: 图赫尔对"幸运的"英格兰感到愤怒——贝林厄姆为球员辩护
zh.summary: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔在球队四分之一决赛战胜挪威后，将其球队描述为"幸运的"，引发了反响。虽然获得了前球员的支持，但遭到进球者朱德·贝林厄姆的异议，这些评论引发了关于球队表现质量的辩论。

title: Did ball hit spidercam before England goal? Snicko says not - Norway unsure
summary: Norway contests England's controversial quarter-final victory, claiming the ball may have struck a spidercam during Jude Bellingham's equalizer; Snicko technology indicates no contact, but the goal stands as confirmed by officials. The incident leaves Norway frustrated after their World Cup campaign ends in defeat.
content: Norway's World Cup campaign ends in a quarter-final defeat by England, but they leave frustrated, arguing that Jude Bellingham's equaliser should not have counted.

zh.title: 球在英格兰进球前击中蜘蛛摄像机了吗？Snicko说没有——挪威不确定
zh.summary: 挪威对英格兰有争议的四分之一决赛胜利提出异议，声称球可能在朱德·贝林厄姆的扳平球时击中了蜘蛛摄像机；Snicko技术表明没有接触，但该球已被官员确认有效。这一事件在挪威世界杯战役以失败告终后让他们感到沮丧。

title: England 'got lucky' with disallowed goal
summary: BBC Sport analysts Wayne Rooney and Ellen White suggest England benefited when Torbjorn Heggem's goal was disallowed for a foul committed during play.
content: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Wayne Rooney and Ellen White believe England "got lucky" after Torbjorn Heggem's second-half goal was ruled out for a foul on Elliott Anderson by Erling Haaland.

zh.title: 英格兰在被判无效进球中"幸运"
zh.summary: BBC体育分析师韦恩·鲁尼和艾伦·怀特认为，当托比约恩·海格姆的进球因比赛中犯规被判无效时，英格兰受益。

title: Pick your England XI for World Cup semi-final
summary: Readers are invited to select their ideal England starting XI for the upcoming World Cup semi-final as the team advances from its quarter-final victory over Norway.
content: England are through to the World Cup semi-finals, but who would you pick in your starting XI?

zh.title: 为世界杯半决赛挑选你的英格兰首发十一人
zh.summary: 邀请读者为即将到来的世界杯半决赛选择他们理想的英格兰首发十一人，因为该队从对挪威的四分之一决赛胜利中晋级。

title: England into semi-finals - what is their path to the final?
summary: England has advanced to the World Cup semi-finals to face Argentina or Switzerland; BBC Sport analyzes the tactical and strategic challenges the team must overcome to reach the final.
content: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the World Cup final after progressing to the semi-finals.

zh.title: 英格兰进入半决赛——他们通向决赛的道路是什么？
zh.summary: 英格兰已进入世界杯半决赛，将面对阿根廷或瑞士；BBC体育分析了球队必须克服的战术和战略挑战以到达决赛。

title: Did spider cam impact England's opener?
summary: BBC Sport pundits debate whether a spider cam had an impact on Jude Bellingham's opening goal for England in their World Cup match against Norway.
content: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Wayne Rooney, Ellen White and Micah Richards look at whether the spider cam had an impact in Jude Bellingham's first goal for England against Norway.

zh.title: 蜘蛛摄像头是否影响了英格兰的首球？
zh.summary: BBC体育评论员讨论蜘蛛摄像头是否对朱德·贝林厄姆在英格兰对阵挪威的世界杯比赛中的首球产生了影响。

title: Bellingham scores extra-time winner as England reach semi-finals
summary: Jude Bellingham scores twice, including an extra-time winner, as England defeats Norway 2-1 in Miami to advance to the World Cup semi-finals.
content: Jude Bellingham scores twice, including an extra-time winner, as England come from behind to beat Norway 2-1 in Miami to reach the World Cup semi-finals.

zh.title: 贝林厄姆打进加时赛制胜球，英格兰晋级半决赛
zh.summary: 朱德·贝林厄姆打进两球，包括一个加时赛制胜球，英格兰在迈阿密以2-1击败挪威，晋级世界杯半决赛。
